sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2204" key="ai)go/plastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰγό-πλαστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n2204.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">goat-shaped</tr_>, Ps.-<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg002:140" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Sphaer.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">140</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
